verdicts.title: Backend product destinations are in-memory only; their schema.sql files are applied by nothing
verdicts.note: app.py:1555 (+ lines 119-263) defaults every product store to InMemory*Store; `class Postgres` grep returns NONE for all 12 modules (projects only has a NotImplementedError skeleton in projects/acl.py:243); no runner reads the schema.sql files and 0033_todo_series is absent.

verdicts.title: Privacy retention_days resolver hook has zero callers
verdicts.note: policy_resolver.py:59,89 defines the privacy_user_retention_days param; a repo-wide grep for `privacy_user_retention_days=` at the 7 RetentionPolicyResolver(...) construction sites returns empty — never passed.

verdicts.title: 10 of 19 initial runtime tables have no writer anywhere
verdicts.note: Per-table `INSERT INTO <t>` grep = 0 for all 10 tables (runtime_events sanity = 1); runtime_memory_items' only writes are retention-sweep UPDATEs at postgres/runtime_api_store.py:3844,4074 (`_sweep_memory_items`), never an INSERT.

verdicts.title: On postgres deployments LangGraph checkpoints live in InMemorySaver; graph continuation does not survive worker restart
verdicts.note: deep_agent_builder.py:311-345 returns AsyncSqliteSaver only when RUNTIME_STORE_BACKEND=file; else _in_memory_checkpointer() (InMemorySaver), and per F3 runtime_checkpoints has zero INSERT writers.

verdicts.title: Legal hold is checked everywhere and settable nowhere
verdicts.note: runtime_legal_holds appears only as SELECT (postgres/runtime_api_store.py:3746-4141) and as a doc/METADATA_KEY in file/_deletion.py:57; grep for `INSERT INTO runtime_legal_holds` and any metadata legal_hold setter returns empty.

verdicts.title: identity_audit_events is the only unchained, untriggered audit stream
verdicts.note: 0002_audit_hardening.sql:8-66 adds seq/prev_hash/signature + audit_writer role + BEFORE UPDATE OR DELETE triggers to mcp/skill; 0004_identity_foundation.sql:120-136 defines identity_audit_events with none of these, and 0016_siem_export only references it as an export source (no chain cols added).

verdicts.title: Desktop physical purge does not cascade to LangGraph checkpoints
verdicts.note: grep for delete_thread/adelete_thread across services/ai-backend/src returns zero call sites; checkpoints.sqlite3 is only created in deep_agent_builder.py:347 and never enters SessionEraser's deletion plan (file/_deletion.py).

verdicts.title: No retention or pruning path for outbox rows, approvals, or tool invocations
verdicts.note: RetentionKind (records/retention.py:36-43) covers only messages/events/context_payloads/checkpoints/memory_items; approval_expiry_sweeper.py:159-167 only enqueues status rejections; grep for `DELETE FROM runtime_outbox_events|runtime_tool_invocations|runtime_approval_batches` returns empty.

verdicts.title: Schema is maintained in two places and already drifting
verdicts.note: todos/store.py:3-4 cites `0033_todo_series.sql` but the real 0033 is 0033_tenant_settings.sql (0033_todo_series absent); the 12 module schema.sql files have no applier, while backend_app/migrations.py:14-38 re-reads only the canonical migrations/ files.

verdicts.title: The yoyo MigrationRunner is duplicated nearly line-for-line across services
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: packages/audit-chain documented as shared Python + TS but contains no TypeScript
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: Session bearer persisted in localStorage
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: Two independent retention mechanisms in the file store
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted without deep verification per instructions.
